race.comment: FRED'S MEMORY (9) has gone to a new level this prep and can surprise in this tougher contest with the 3kg claim. Taken to the front and never troubled with a dominant victory over 1190m at Grafton in C1 class. Maps well and will prove hard to get past. MASTER ARTIST (4) kept fresh when he improved sharply in the heavy going to stalk the speed and get the job done over 1400m at Coffs Harbour. Kept fresh again and sure to be thereabouts. HEADSTRONG (7) shouldered the 59.5kg when he improved sharply to score as fav over 1540m at the Gold Coast Poly. Confidence is now high and can handle the rise in grade. TRIBBIANI (1) improving gelding who stretches out in trip today. Resumed with a commanding on-pace win over 1205m at Coffs Harbour with the 60kg. Claim helps again and will need a good ride from the draw. Place best.
